title: Aweil Heat Wave
lead: Aweil is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.14. The score of 10.0/10 indicates extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Aweil has reached critical levels, with a Z-Score of +3.14 and a score of 10.0/10. 
 The air is extremely hot and humid, with an umidita of 66% and a vento of 0.4 km/h. 
 The CDD is 10.0 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling, while the HDD is 0.0 GG, showing no need for heating.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
